stereotype: «ResourceAccess» — owns github external softwareSystem (cloud) / local on-disk git (LOCAL); two contracts: ISourceControlLifecycle (this) + IPullRequestRail
volatility: GitHub-App-lifecycle volatility — how aiarch comes to hold a credential and a provisioned repo in the user's own source-control account (install/authorize the App, adopt the per-project repo, mint the short-lived installation credential, seat aiarch-managed scaffold files). A swap of the source-control provider must not change the surface.

outbound.name: github
outbound.how: Single outbound edge: architecture.dsl line 461/607. GitHub App REST/GraphQL: App-JWT → installations → access_tokens → repo topics/description → contents PUT.

ops.signature: InstallAuthorizeApp(ctx, account AccountRef, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (Installation, error)
ops.note: Discovers and confirms App installation on account (cloud: GET /app/installations → match account). Returns opaque Installation handle. NotFound (fwra) if user has not installed the App (non-headless browser step is out-of-band). Idempotent on account. SHORT timeout (~30s), retryable on Transient, terminal on Auth/NotFound/ContractMisuse.

fields.name: Account
fields.note: the user's org/account this project belongs to — provider-neutral

fields.name: Installation
fields.note: opaque handle confirming aiarch holds standing authorization on account

ops.signature: AdoptProjectRepo(ctx, spec RepoAdoptionSpec, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (RepoRef, error)
ops.stereotype: Write — adopt the user's EXISTING repo (permissive-resume, 2026-06-16)
ops.note: Verifies repo is reachable under the App installation, applies aiarch-project topic + project-title description, returns RepoRef. Permissive: succeeds regardless of repo content (README/claude.yml/prior .aiarch/ tree all fine). Only error: NotUnderInstallation (NotFound). Resume from committed .aiarch/state/project.json handled one layer up by projectStateAccess.createProject, not here. Idempotent on RepoName. No emptiness probe.

fields.name: Spec
fields.note: RepoAdoptionSpec{RepoName string, Account AccountRef, Title string, Hints []byte}; RepoName is the user-supplied identity (name-as-identity)

fields.name: Repo
fields.note: opaque provider-neutral handle to the adopted repo

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; only real error is NotFound (NotUnderInstallation) or ContractMisuse (empty name/account)

ops.stereotype: Read-shaped mint — hand back a working credential
ops.note: Mints and returns a short-lived RepoCredential{Bytes,ExpiresAt}. Returned, never recorded. The Manager threads it into projectStateAccess/artifactAccess/constructionPipelineAccess/operatedRuntimeAccess and IPullRequestRail verbs as a caller-supplied parameter (RA-never-calls-RA resolution). SHORT timeout (~15s), retryable on Transient, terminal on Auth/NotFound/ContractMisuse. Manager re-mints before ExpiresAt.

fields.name: Repo
fields.note: the adopted repo to scope the credential to; from AdoptProjectRepo

fields.name: Credential
fields.note: RepoCredential{Bytes []byte, ExpiresAt time.Time}; opaque short-lived bearer credential; returned-never-recorded; Manager threads into consuming seams

ops.signature: CommitManagedFiles(ctx, repo RepoRef, files []ManagedFile, cred RepoCredential, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (CommitRef, error)
ops.stereotype: Write — seat aiarch-managed scaffold (generalized 2026-06-16 from commitAgenticWorkflowFile)
ops.note: Commits the design workflow + go-test gate scaffold (.github/workflows/aiarch-design.yml, go.mod, aiarch_method_test.go) via the installation token. Each file path must be on the managed-file allowlist: under .github/workflows/ OR a scaffold root (go.mod, aiarch_method_test.go) — enforced as ContractMisuse otherwise. Overwrite-if-changed per file, convergent on (repo, Path). Retryable on Transient/Conflict, terminal on Auth/NotFound/ContractMisuse.

fields.name: Repo
fields.note: the adopted repo to commit files to

fields.name: Files
fields.note: ManagedFile{Path string, Content []byte}; each Path must be on the managed-file allowlist (.github/workflows/ OR scaffold root go.mod/aiarch_method_test.go)

fields.name: Commit
fields.note: opaque provider-neutral handle to the resulting commit (last file's commit on sequential PUTs)

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; Conflict (concurrent write race) is Retryable=true; NotFound/Auth/ContractMisuse are terminal

dataContracts: RepoAdoptionSpec { RepoName string; Account AccountRef; Title string; Hints []byte }
ManagedFile { Path string; Content []byte } (Path must be on managed-file allowlist)
RepoCredential { Bytes []byte; ExpiresAt time.Time } (opaque short-lived bearer credential — write-only, never logged/persisted/compared)
errorModel: fwra.Error kinds: Transient (Retryable=true), Auth (Retryable=false), NotFound (Retryable=false — covers NotInstalled on installAuthorizeApp and NotUnderInstallation on adoptProjectRepo), Conflict (Retryable=true — CommitManagedFiles concurrent-write race only; adoptProjectRepo NO LONGER returns Conflict after 2026-06-16 permissive-resume ruling), ContractMisuse (Retryable=false). No RepoNotEmpty (removed 2026-06-16).
idempotency: installAuthorizeApp: idempotent on account (no-op on installed account). adoptProjectRepo: idempotent on RepoName — re-applies topic/description regardless of content. GetInstallationToken: mint-on-demand, trivially safe to repeat. CommitManagedFiles: overwrite-if-changed per file on (repo, Path); byte-identical → no empty commit. All write ops carry optional fwra.IdempotencyKey for traceability.

revisions.summary: Initial 3-op design: installAuthorizeApp + provisionProjectRepo + getInstallationToken. Senior review APPROVE-AND-FREEZE 2026-06-10.

3→5 ops: provisionProjectRepo REPLACED by adoptProjectRepo (strict-adopt of user's existing empty repo); +writeActionsSecret; +commitAgenticWorkflowFile. Strict-adopt policy: hard-fails on any non-empty repo (RepoNotEmpty/Conflict). Senior review PASS-WITH-AMENDMENTS 2026-06-15.

Founder ruling: writeActionsSecret REMOVED (aiarch does NO secret management; CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN is user-provisioned via the Claude Code GitHub App /install-github-app). Contract-1 is now 4 ops. secrets:write App permission dropped.

adoptProjectRepo policy changed: strict-empty hard-fail (RepoNotEmpty/Conflict) REMOVED. Now permissive: succeeds regardless of repo content; only real error is NotUnderInstallation. Resume from existing .aiarch/state/project.json handled by projectStateAccess.createProject. Conflict removed from adoptProjectRepo error set.

commitAgenticWorkflowFile GENERALIZED to commitManagedFiles: seats a fileSET (design workflow + go.mod + aiarch_method_test.go) in one birth seat. Path pre-condition relaxed from single .github/workflows/ prefix to managed-file ALLOWLIST. Op count unchanged (still 4 ops).
